description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, featuring a deep, rich reddish-brown finish and a visible wood grain pattern. The body is contoured and bordered with a cream or ivory binding, giving it a classic, high-end appearance. The front face displays multiple gold-colored control knobs, two humbucker pickups, and a gold bridge, all contributing to its luxurious aesthetic. The neck is dark, likely made of mahogany or rosewood, and is fitted with inlaid fret markers along a dark fingerboard. The headstock is equipped with six gold tuning pegs arranged in a three-per-side configuration, and the back of the guitar is finished in the same deep reddish-brown as the body. This instrument is visually striking and designed for both performance and display in urban music venues or street performances.
description: A luxurious, single-cutaway electric guitar with a deep reddish-brown finish, gold hardware, and cream binding. It features dual humbucker pickups, multiple control knobs, and a dark, inlaid fingerboard.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the guitar's thickness, gold hardware, and the edge of the cream binding.
description_view_1: The back view reveals the deep reddish-brown wood grain, cream binding, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile highlights the guitar's body depth, gold bridge, and the edge of the pickups.
description_view_3: The front view displays the guitar's face, including the gold hardware, dual humbucker pickups, control knobs, and inlaid fretboard.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, dark finish, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style contour
